_comment: Local-dev stub. CI overwrites this with repo.json content at release time. Edit repo.json (the single source of truth); this file only exists so local debug builds load with sensible metadata.
Author: MTVirux
Name: Glamourous Terror
Punchline: Custom build of Glamourer by MTVirux with added features
Description: DM @mtvirux on discord for assistance or bug reports. THIS REPLACES GLAMOURER, so make sure to uninstall either Glamourer or GlamorousTerror before installing the other.
